postData.title: Decompile PyInstaller Executable
postData.content: Using this script https://github.com/extremecoders-re/pyinstxtractor we can extract the `.pyc` files from the `.exe` file created by `Pyinstaller`. Then we can use https://github.com/rocky/python-uncompyle6 to decompile the `.pyc` files to original source code in `.py` format.
postData.markdownSource: Using this script https://github.com/extremecoders-re/pyinstxtractor we can extract the `.pyc` files from the `.exe` file created by `Pyinstaller`. Then we can use https://github.com/rocky/python-uncompyle6 to decompile the `.pyc` files to original source code in `.py` format.
